name: Custom Brute-force Login Attempts (>50 Failed)
description: Phát hiện đăng nhập lỗi quá 50 lần từ một IP nguồn

log_requirements.why: Needed to restrict to failed logons.

false_positive_scenarios: Approved password spray simulation or vulnerability scanning from known ranges
tuning_notes: Whitelist approved scanner IPs and tune threshold per environment segment.

priority_questions: Is the source IP internal, VPN or external?
Was there a subsequent successful authentication from the same source?
enrichment_queries: Search same source.ip across 24h of authentication logs
Check IP reputation or CMDB ownership

validation.test_strategy: Replay failed authentication burst in dev index.
validation.expected_outcome: Rule triggers when threshold of failed logons is met.
